text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I stretch for five minutes, then drink a glass of water and have a light breakfast. By 8 a.m., I start my workday at the office, where I usually have meetings and handle emails until noon. After lunch, I take a 30-minute walk to stay active. In the evening, I either go to the gym or do yoga at home. Then I cook dinner, read a book, and try to be in bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me feel balanced and productive every day.
